session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report all results. Do not fix anything, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci from repository root

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results Summary
make fast-ci: **PASSED - All checks successful**
### Detailed Results:
**Linting:** - Ruff lint: All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Prettier formatting: All matched files use Prettier code style
**Code Quality:** - Format check: 1626 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK (`.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date)
**Test Suite:** - Unit tests (erk): **5487 passed** in 11.50s - Tests (erk-dev): **136 passed** in 4.30s - Tests (erk-statusline): **112 passed** in 0.78s - Tests (erkbot): **114 passed** in 1.62s
**Documentation & Standards:** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md pairing: All properly paired - CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 - Violations: 0
**Total: 5849 tests passed** across all test suites with zero failures or violations.
